title: stuckenia helvetica
intro: Stuckenia helvetica, also known as water wisk or lesser water-plantain, is a species of aquatic plant in the family Potamogetonaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues, as it contains flavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stuckenia helvetica include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Stuckenia helvetica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
